items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #2' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior regarding AI-generated parameters. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the expected outcome of this scenario. As a result, it is unclear whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a failure report, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
